title: Remove items from mywork
excerpt: Anyone know the best way to show the subitems of an item in Mywork, but not the item itself? we use Monday.com to manage projects. We need the item to be the project name, to include the owner, and to include a timeline …

posts.author: silverberrytree (Elise)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone know the best way to show the subitems of an item in Mywork, but not the item itself? we use Monday.com to manage projects. We need the item to be the project name, to include the owner, and to include a timeline to show up correctly in the dashboard, but the item owners would prefer to see only the subitems in their mywork view, not the subitems and the item. Is that possible?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @silverberrytree,

If you customise your my work, and remove the status + date columns associated with the parent item, this should solve the problem for you and only display the subitems:

As you can see only the subitems are displaying:

Screen Shot 2022-12-16 at 11.24.25 am1824×210 14.7 KB

Let me know if this helps!
